texto: A woman's greatest and most perduring failure will be her failure to love. It is certainly not without significance that so many women presently pressing for power on the political, sociological or ecclesial scene are unbeautiful in their unsmilling press for dominance. Contorted faces and clenched fists are particularly repellant in woman, who is gifted with unique powers to radiate love and extend healing hands.
explicacao: Citação de Mother Mary Francis P.C.C. sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “A woman's greatest and most perduring failure will be her failure to love. It is certainly not wi…” articula amor, feminism, love em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como termino e love.
